subcodes.first_line: O servant in attendance! God hath created thee, sustained thee, reared thee, and made thee a servant unto His Own Self, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy bountiful Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد حاضر ان الله خلقک و رزقک و رباک و جعلک خادما لنفسه لتشکر ربک الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
